evals.prompt: I have a web app using ZXing (@zxing/library) for barcode scanning. I want to replace it with BarcodeCapture. Here is my scanner module: zxing-scanner.ts
evals.expected_output: Removes all @zxing/library APIs (BrowserMultiFormatReader, decodeFromVideoDevice, DecodeHintType, BarcodeFormat), adds a BarcodeCapture integration with matching symbologies (EAN13UPCA, Code128, QR), preserves the deduplication logic and the on-screen summary, and shows a summary of changes plus a setup checklist with the scoped npm packages.

assertions.text: The @zxing/library import is removed from the new code (semantic)
BrowserMultiFormatReader is NOT instantiated in the new code (it may appear in a before/after summary table) (semantic)
decodeFromVideoDevice is NOT called in the new code (it may appear in a before/after summary table) (semantic)
BarcodeFormat is NOT used as an enum in the new scanning code (it may appear in a before/after mapping table) (semantic)
DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is used to initialize the context
barcodeCaptureLoader() is present in moduleLoaders
A license key placeholder (e.g. ENTER YOUR SCANDIT LICENSE KEY) is present
BarcodeCaptureSettings is created and enableSymbologies is called
Symbology.EAN13UPCA is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.EAN_13)
Symbology.Code128 is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.CODE_128)
Symbology.QR is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.QR_CODE)
BarcodeCapture.forContext( is present and awaited
A BarcodeCaptureListener with a didScan callback replaces the ZXing decode callback
session.newlyRecognizedBarcode is accessed inside didScan
await barcodeCapture.setEnabled(false) is called inside didScan before processing the result
DataCaptureView.forContext( is present and view.connectToElement( is called
BarcodeCaptureOverlay.withBarcodeCaptureForView( is present
switchToDesiredState(FrameSourceState.On) is called to start the camera
The scannedItems array (or equivalent results collection) is preserved
The deduplication logic (checking for an existing entry before adding) is preserved
The on-screen summary rendering (renderSummary or equivalent) is preserved and still invoked after a new scan
A summary of changes is shown listing what was removed (ZXing APIs) and what was added (BarcodeCapture APIs)
Setup checklist mentions the @scandit/web-datacapture-core npm package
Setup checklist mentions the @scandit/web-datacapture-barcode npm package
